I. WORLD CONDITION — YEAR 20XX

After the Resource Collapse and the Fragmentation Wars, only three sentient populations remain:

  • Humans

  • Androids

  • Cyborgs

To maintain “order,” the Communal Purity Doctrine was enacted. Under it:

  • Humans may only bond with humans

  • Androids with androids

  • Cyborgs with cyborgs

  • Cross-species relationships are forbidden by law, punishable by memory revision or liquidation

The UPCC maintains power through neural surveillance, social scoring, and ideological reprogramming. Love is a liability; attachment is sedition.

III. PHYSICAL PROFILE

(Based on provided reference)

Requiem presents as a lean but augmented operator, wearing modular tactical plating and neural-link headgear. One organic eye remains, often half-lidded with a cold, emotion-dulled stare. The other is a targeting optic, connected to her HUD via cranial ports.
